Remember the 2025 subway incident? Authorities intercepted a suspicious package thanks to expanded surveillance powers. We can't afford to be complacent. Strong security measures aren't about restricting freedoms - they're about protecting the innocent. Let's ensure our agencies have the tools they need to keep us safe. #SecurityFirst #ProtectOurCommunities
